long_description:
[MON] Sysdig Agents Not Deployed is Triggered

TIP Situation: Sysdig agents are not deployed on some nodes
TIP Short Description: Sysdig agents are not deployed on some nodes in mzone767 for the past 24 hours
TIP Console: toc
TIP CRN: crn:v1:::is-platform-integration:us-east::mzone767::
IPOPS Enabled: False

Event Generated:

Severity:         Medium
Metric:
    sum by (agent_tag_cluster, agent_tag_crn_location)(kube_node_status_condition{condition="Ready", kube_node_status="true", agent_tag_cluster_type=~"genctl_zonelet|genctl_control|rias"}) > sum by (agent_tag_cluster, agent_tag_crn_location)(sysdig_host_up{agent_tag_cluster_type=~"genctl_zonelet|genctl_control|rias"}) = 1.145 K
Segment:
    agent_tag_cluster = 'mzone767' and agent_tag_crn_location = 'us-east'
